description_long: This house features a boxy, modernist design with a flat roof and a prominent rectangular chimney structure rising from the center. The exterior is clad in two-tone brickwork, with a lighter beige upper section and a reddish-brown lower section, separated by a horizontal band. Large, rectangular windows with white frames are symmetrically arranged on the front and sides, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The main entrance is accessed by a small set of steps and features a black door with a grid window, set into the reddish-brown brick base. The roof is flat except for the central chimney, which has a shed-style roof and a secondary door, possibly for rooftop access. The house sits on a paved base, suggesting an urban or suburban setting.
description: A modern, boxy house with flat and shed roofs, two-tone brick exterior, large rectangular windows, and a prominent central chimney structure.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with steps, two large front windows, and the central chimney structure above.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the symmetrical window arrangement and the flat roof with the raised chimney structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uninterrupted brick facade, the full width of the flat roof, and the central chimney.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the secondary door on the chimney structure and the flat roof expanse.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with black door, small steps, and no porch or overhang, set into the lower brick section.
